title: Real-Time Analytics for Crypto Product Stores: What It Actually Is and How It Works
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Are you a digital creator struggling to sell ebooks, courses, or templates in countries with PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad restrictions? Maybe you're in Nigeria, Pakistan, or Venezuela, where these platforms just don't work. You're not alone. Thousands of creators worldwide face the same problem. That's why we built the Admin Dashboard, a real-time analytics tool for crypto product stores. With it, you can finally see every order, every payment, and every delivery from anywhere in the world.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Real-time analytics for crypto product stores is more than just a fancy name for a dashboard. It's a way to understand your customers, track your sales, and adjust your strategies to increase revenue. With the Admin Dashboard, you get transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. This means you can see every order, every payment, and every delivery from anywhere in the world – without relying on PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Pricing digital products in crypto is simpler than most creators expect. You set your price in USD. The Web3 Wallet Connect module pulls live exchange rates from price feeds and displays the equivalent amount in whatever coin the buyer chooses — Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, Solana, or 300 more options. The buyer always pays the USD equivalent at the time of transaction. NOWPayments handles the currency conversion accounting. You receive the crypto equivalent of your USD price in your wallet. For USDT-priced products, there is no conversion at all — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus network fees that typically amount to less than one percent of the transaction.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Admin Dashboard is built for digital creators who sell ebooks, courses, templates, and other digital products in countries with PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad restrictions. It's perfect for creators in Nigeria, Pakistan, Venezuela, and other countries where these platforms just don't work. With the Admin Dashboard, you can finally see every order, every payment, and every delivery from anywhere in the world.
Real-time analytics for crypto product stores gives you a clear picture of your sales and customer behavior.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Admin Dashboard includes three key components: transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. Transaction logs give you a record of every sale, order management helps you keep track of your orders, and real-time analytics provide you with up-to-the-minute data on your sales and customer behavior. Together, these components give you a complete picture of your business and help you make informed decisions.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know what real-time analytics for crypto product stores is and how it works, it's time to take action. First, sign up for the Admin Dashboard and connect your store. Then, use the transaction logs and order management features to track your sales and customer behavior. Finally, use the real-time analytics to adjust your strategies and increase your revenue.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
The Admin Dashboard connects to your store's database and pulls in transaction data without requiring any special setup or integration.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for ways to sell ebooks, courses, or templates without relying on PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad, you're in luck. The Admin Dashboard is the perfect solution. With its real-time analytics and transaction logs, you can finally see every order, every payment, and every delivery from anywhere in the world. And if you're struggling to find the right platform to sell your digital products, check out the Unchained Commerce Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html – it's a crypto-only digital download store that makes it easy to sell your products without any restrictions.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling your ebooks, courses, or templates using the Admin Dashboard, follow these steps: 1) Sign up for the Admin Dashboard and connect your store; 2) Use the transaction logs and order management features to track your sales and customer behavior; 3) Adjust your strategies based on the real-time analytics; 4) Use the Admin Dashboard to see every order, every payment, and every delivery from anywhere in the world.
With the Admin Dashboard, you can finally see every order, every payment, and every delivery from anywhere in the world – without relying on PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad.
Admin Dashboard — $29.99. Transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. See every order, every payment, every delivery — from anywhere in the world.
